evidence.scientific_clarity: All three required equations (ELBO, KL decomposition, RetroDiff retrieval objective) are present with explanatory prose and \eqref cross-references; derivation chain is complete and the RetroDiff contribution is clearly labelled.
evidence.typography: pdflatex produces Latin Modern Type 1 fonts (LMRoman, LMMathItalic, LMMathSymbols, MSBM) — all fully embedded and subsetted; no DejaVu Sans; fonttype=42 is not applicable to pdflatex output, which is inherently vector Type 1.
evidence.palette: Pure black-on-white text figure; no colour used, so no colorblind risk and no directional/categorical colour discipline issues.
evidence.layout_density: Content occupies rows 247–1412 of a 2200-row (letter-size) page, leaving ~47% blank at the bottom; the content block itself is well-spaced with no overlapping labels.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately describes all three equations and matches the figure; QED box is appropriate; however, the caption does not sharply articulate what makes Eq. (3) novel beyond restating the conditioning, and the large bottom margin may draw a comment.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdftotext extracts fully selectable text from figure.pdf; all 14 font entries in pdffonts are Type 1, embedded and subsetted, produced by pdfTeX-1.40.29 — genuine vector PDF.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (144 KB), figure.png (316 KB, 1700×2200), caption.tex (943 B), gen_figure.py (1.4 KB) all present and non-trivial; equations.tex is absent from the work directory but is not listed in the rubric's required set.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption explains the role of each equation and the derivation chain, and notes the Gaussian posterior property; it lacks a specific numerical claim or concise one-sentence finding (e.g., how Eq. (3) reduces to Eq. (1) in the zero-retrieval limit).

overall_strengths: Proper LaTeX math typesetting throughout: Latin Modern fonts, correct use of \mathbb{E}, \mathcal{L}, \mathrm{KL}, underbrace annotations on Eq. (2), and a QED box — publication-ready math layout.
Complete three-equation derivation chain with explanatory prose between each step and working \eqref cross-references, directly satisfying the brief's scientific requirements.
overall_weaknesses: Roughly half the letter-size page is blank below the derivation block; cropping the page to content height (or using a geometry package with a tighter textheight) would eliminate the wasted space.

Caption is descriptive but lacks a sharp, quotable finding — a single sentence stating the key implication of Eq. (3) (e.g., the retrieval conditioning leaves the ELBO convergence guarantee intact) would strengthen reviewer readiness.
